decisions.briefing: Risk-on day with NASDAQ leading at +0.8% and S&P 500 up +0.5%, supporting new momentum buys. With 4 open slots and cash available, I'm filling three with the top-scoring candidates (CBRS, ELF, USLM) — all score 100 with RSI in the bullish momentum zone and volume surges. Avoided the overbought names (TNGX 77.9, NIC 76.3, OSCR 75.8, SRAD 74.5) as chasing extended RSIs in the 75+ range typically raises reversal risk.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets extended gains in a broad risk-on session, with technology and growth names leading as investor appetite for higher-risk assets remained elevated. The NASDAQ outpaced the S&P 500, a pattern typical when sentiment shifts toward cyclical and momentum-driven sectors rather than defensives. No major macro headwinds emerged to disrupt the rally, allowing momentum stocks with strong technicals to continue breaking out.
market_education.summary_zh: 股市在風險偏好情緒帶動下全面上揚，科技及成長股領漲。那斯達克表現優於標普500，反映資金持續流向動能強勁的週期性板塊，而非防禦型資產。宏觀面未現重大利空，使技術面強勢股得以延續突破走勢，整體市場氣氛樂觀。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks that have been trending upward and showing strong price and volume signals, with the expectation that the trend will continue. Indicators like RSI (measuring speed of price change) and MACD (measuring trend direction and strength) help identify stocks in healthy uptrends versus those that are overextended. Today's top picks (CBRS, ELF, USLM) exemplify ideal momentum setups — RSI in the 55–70 bullish zone, not yet overbought, with confirming volume.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入價格持續上漲、技術訊號強勁的股票，預期趨勢將延續。RSI（衡量價格變動速度）與MACD（衡量趨勢方向與強度）是判斷股票是否處於健康上升趨勢或已過度延伸的重要工具。今日精選的CBRS、ELF及USLM均屬標準動能佈局——RSI介於55至70的強勢區間，尚未進入超買，且成交量同步放大確認趨勢。
